methods.name: fund_due_cashflows
methods.desc: Reserve due ACTUS cash events into the escrow-style claim ledger.

events.name: ExecutionEvent
events.desc: Non-normative receipt for on-chain execution of a scheduled ACTUS event.

methods.name: claim_due_cashflows
methods.desc: Withdraw the holder's already funded ACTUS cash entitlements.

methods.name: primary_distribution
methods.desc: Reserve units for a holder before IED finalizes issuance.

methods.name: transfer
methods.desc:
Transfer active units after settling both counterparties to the current cursor.
Returns the number of units moved. The ACTUS kernel no longer persists a nominal per-unit value on-chain, so transfer results are unit-based.

methods.name: account_gov_suspension

returns.desc: Timestamp of the set account suspension status

methods.desc: Set account suspension status

methods.name: account_open
methods.desc: Open a contract account with a new position and register its payment address.

methods.name: account_update_payment_address
methods.desc: Update the Payment Address of an account

methods.name: account_get_position
methods.desc: Get account position

methods.name: contract_create
methods.desc: Create a new D-ASA contract and set the Arranger role

methods.name: contract_config
methods.desc:
Partial contract configuration with: normalized ACTUS terms, initial kernel
state (pre-IED), prospectus (informational only). The contract stays inactive until all schedule pages are configured next.

methods.name: contract_schedule
methods.desc:
Upload one normalized schedule page.
The configuration operation is considered complete only when the last page is stored. At that point `schedule_entry_count` is finalized and the contract moves to `STATUS_PENDING_IED`.

methods.name: execute_ied
methods.desc:
Execute the first due `IED` entry and activate the contract.
`IED` is the one non-cash event that moves the app from `STATUS_PENDING_IED` to `STATUS_ACTIVE`.

events.name: ExecutionEvent
events.desc: Non-normative receipt for on-chain execution of a scheduled ACTUS event.

methods.name: apply_non_cash_event
methods.desc:
Apply the next due non-cash event, optionally appending one first.
Observed payloads are appended before execution when flagged. Rate reset events require the interest oracle because they can change the running nominal rate; other non-cash events stay arranger-controlled.

events.name: ExecutionEvent
events.desc: Non-normative receipt for on-chain execution of a scheduled ACTUS event.

methods.name: get_contract_state
methods.desc: Return a readonly snapshot of the generic ACTUS kernel state.

methods.name: get_next_due_event
methods.desc: Return the next boxed schedule entry, or a zeroed sentinel if ended.

methods.name: contract_update
methods.desc: Update D-ASA application.

methods.name: rbac_rotate_arranger
methods.desc: Rotate the Arranger address

methods.name: rbac_set_op_daemon
methods.desc: Non-Normative: Set the Operation Daemon address

methods.name: rbac_assign_role
methods.desc: Assign a role to an address

methods.name: rbac_revoke_role
methods.desc: Revoke a role from an address

methods.name: rbac_gov_asset_suspension

returns.desc: Timestamp of the set asset suspension status

methods.desc: Set asset suspension status

methods.name: rbac_get_arranger
methods.desc: Get Arranger address

methods.name: rbac_get_address_roles

returns.desc: Roles mask: (Account Manager, Primary Dealer, Trustee, Authority, Observer)

methods.desc: Non-normative - Get roles assigned to an address

methods.name: rbac_get_role_validity
methods.desc: Get role validity
